domain: Balinese Subak cooperative irrigation system (Bali, Indonesia, UNESCO 2012, since 9th c CE): 5 cultural landscapes / 19,500 ha rice terraces; 50-400 farmers per subak share single water source; pekaseh elected leader coordinates upstream-downstream water-share fairness; Pura Ulun Danu apex temple coordinates basin-wide water release across subaks; Tri Hita Karana philosophy balances spiritual + human + natural worlds; democratic per-subak governance with hierarchical attenuating control.
specific_mechanism: SUBAK-WATER-TEMPLE-HIERARCHICAL-COOPERATIVE-PEKASEH-COORDINATOR-UPSTREAM-DOWNSTREAM-FAIRNESS-TRI-HITA-KARANA-APEX-BASIN-FEEDBACK-ATTENUATION: LLM feedback-attenuation mechanism with (1) apex-temple basin coordinator A_apex: top-level meta-agent dispatches global signal (water-release = global learning-rate); (2) pekaseh per-subak coordinator P_kase: mid-level elected coordinator per group; receives apex signal + redistributes within group; (3) upstream-downstream fairness damping D_ud: feedback signal attenuates as it propagates downstream — explicit attenuation factor α<1 prevents downstream over-correction; (4) cooperative water-share fairness F_fair: per-farmer allocation balanced against group quota; redistribution constraint; (5) tri-hita-karana 3-axis harmony T_3: 3 orthogonal regularization axes — spiritual (alignment) + human (helpfulness) + natural (factuality). Differs from R537 BAYT-AL-SHA'R-3-PLY-ADAPTIVE-FALA'IF-DRY-WET-DAMPING (3-ply layered damping + dry-wet adaptive porosity + oil-coated high-freq shed + regime-switch + convection smoothing) by water-temple hierarchical cooperative + pekaseh elected coordinator + upstream-downstream fairness damping + tri-hita-karana 3-axis harmony + apex-temple basin-wide coordination.
llm_application: SUBAK-WATER-TEMPLE-HIERARCHICAL-COOPERATIVE-PEKASEH-COORDINATOR-UPSTREAM-DOWNSTREAM-FAIRNESS-TRI-HITA-KARANA-APEX-BASIN-FEEDBACK-ATTENUATION LLM mechanism + apex-temple A_apex global signal water-release analog + pekaseh P_kase mid-level elected coordinator + upstream-downstream D_ud damping α<1 propagation + cooperative F_fair per-head allocation group-quota redistribution + tri-hita-karana T_3 3-axis spiritual-human-natural harmony balanced. Differs from R537 BAYT-AL-SHA'R (closest — 3-ply layered damping + dry-wet porosity + oil-coated high-freq + regime-switch + convection smoothing). Differs from Multi-Agent Collaboration 2501.06322 + Adaptive Resource Allocation 2502.02287 + LLM Serving 2605.01280 + Reliable MAS by water-temple hierarchical + pekaseh + upstream-downstream + tri-hita-karana + apex. Differs by APEX-TEMPLE BASIN COORDINATOR + PEKASEH PER-SUBAK + UPSTREAM-DOWNSTREAM FAIRNESS DAMPING + TRI-HITA-KARANA 3-AXIS + COOPERATIVE FAIRNESS.
novelty_claim: Multi-Agent Collaboration 2501.06322 + Adaptive Resource Allocation 2502.02287 + LLM Serving Optimization 2605.01280 + Reliable MAS literature covers multi-agent + adaptive feedback + cooperative paradigm. SUBAK-WATER-TEMPLE-HIERARCHICAL-COOPERATIVE-PEKASEH-COORDINATOR-UPSTREAM-DOWNSTREAM-FAIRNESS-TRI-HITA-KARANA-APEX-BASIN adds (a) apex-temple coordinator + (b) pekaseh elected + (c) upstream-downstream damping + (d) tri-hita-karana + (e) cooperative water-share fairness. Recombination — borderline lookup.
